user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: Official name of the AI company or organization

columns.name: Website
columns.description: Official company website URL where company information and careers page can be accessed

columns.name: Is Hiring for AI Roles?
columns.description: Confirmed status of whether the company currently has open positions specifically for AI-related roles (machine learning engineer, AI researcher, data scientist, AI product manager, etc.). Must be verified as of the research date.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page, LinkedIn jobs section, and major job boards (Indeed, Glassdoor, AngelList) for open AI-specific positions. Verify positions are currently active and not archived. Document at least one specific open AI role title as evidence.

columns.name: Team Size (Approximate)
columns.description: Estimated total number of employees at the company. Provide range if exact number unavailable (e.g., '50-100', '500+', '1000-5000'). Include source of estimate.
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from company website (About/Team section), LinkedIn company page (employee count), Crunchbase, or recent news articles. Prioritize LinkedIn employee count as most reliable source. Note if this is a startup (under 50), scale-up (50-500), or established company (500+).

columns.name: Recent Funding (Last Round)
columns.description: Details of the most recent funding round including round type (Seed, Series A/B/C, etc.), amount raised, date of funding, and lead investors if available. Include 'Bootstrapped' or 'Profitable' if not venture-funded. Include 'N/A' if information unavailable.
columns.validation_strategy: Research on Crunchbase, PitchBook, company press releases, and TechCrunch. Look for most recent funding announcement. Include round designation, dollar amount, and approximate date (month/year). Verify information is from official sources or reputable business databases.

columns.name: AI Sector Focus
columns.description: Primary sector or domain where the company applies AI technology. Categorize as: Research (foundational AI/ML), Healthcare (medical AI, biotech), Enterprise (B2B software, productivity), or Other (specify). A company may span multiple sectors; list primary focus.
columns.validation_strategy: Review company mission statement, product descriptions, and recent news. Identify whether company focuses on AI research/models, healthcare applications, enterprise software, or other domain. Verify through company website, pitch deck, or recent announcements.

columns.name: Company Stage
columns.description: Classification of company maturity: Startup (pre-Series A or early stage), Scale-up (Series A-C), Established (Series D+, IPO, or major tech company), or Acquired (if recently acquired by larger company). Note acquisition details if applicable.
columns.validation_strategy: Determine based on funding history, employee count, and market presence. Cross-reference funding data with company age and growth trajectory. Check if company has been acquired or is a subsidiary of a larger organization.

columns.name: Example Open AI Roles
columns.description: Specific examples of currently open AI-related positions at the company (e.g., 'Machine Learning Engineer', 'AI Research Scientist', 'Data Scientist'). List 2-3 representative titles if multiple positions available.
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from company careers page or LinkedIn jobs. List actual job titles as posted. Verify these are currently active postings (not archived). Include link or reference to where positions were found.

search_strategy.description: Identify AI companies across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors that are actively hiring for AI roles, including both established companies and startups

subdomains.name: AI Research & Foundational Model Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies focused on foundational AI research, large language models, and core AI/ML technology development
search_queries: AI research companies hiring machine learning engineers 2025
large language model companies recruiting AI researchers
foundational AI startups hiring positions
AI safety and alignment research organizations hiring

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Biotech AI Companies
subdomains.focus: Organizations applying AI to healthcare, medical imaging, drug discovery, and biotech applications
search_queries: healthcare AI companies hiring data scientists 2025
medical AI startups recruiting machine learning engineers
biotech AI companies open positions
clinical AI and medical imaging companies hiring

subdomains.name: Enterprise AI & B2B Software Companies
subdomains.focus: Companies building AI-powered enterprise software, productivity tools, and B2B AI solutions
search_queries: enterprise AI software companies hiring 2025
B2B AI startups recruiting engineers
AI productivity tools companies open positions
business intelligence AI companies hiring

subdomains.name: Established Tech Companies with AI Divisions
subdomains.focus: Major technology companies (Google, Microsoft, Meta, Amazon, Apple) and established AI-focused subsidiaries actively hiring
search_queries: Google DeepMind AI researcher positions hiring
Microsoft AI research hiring machine learning engineers
Meta AI research positions open
Amazon AWS AI hiring positions 2025

subdomains.name: AI Infrastructure & Tools Startups
subdomains.focus: Companies building AI infrastructure, MLOps platforms, and developer tools for AI applications
search_queries: AI infrastructure startups hiring engineers 2025
MLOps platform companies recruiting positions
AI developer tools companies open roles
machine learning infrastructure companies hiring

search_strategy.user_context:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.
search_strategy.table_purpose: Identify AI companies across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors that are actively hiring for AI roles, including both established companies and startups

final_rows.match_rationale: Novartis is a global pharma leader using AI for clinical trial design, site selection, and drug discovery, with ongoing public research and digital transformation efforts likely requiring AI hires[7].

Moderna is a major biotech firm aggressively integrating AI across R&D, manufacturing, and operations, with public initiatives like its AI Academy and hundreds of custom GPT agents, indicating active hiring for AI talent[7].
OpenAI is a leading AI research company actively hiring for AI roles, particularly in foundational models like ChatGPT.
Anthropic is a prominent AI research startup known for its high retention rate and active hiring of AI talent.
Insilico Medicine is a prominent AI-driven drug discovery company, recently raised $110M in Series E funding, and is actively advancing AI-discovered drugs into clinical trials[5][12].
Aidoc is a leading AI medical imaging company that recently raised $150M, indicating growth and likely hiring for AI roles in healthcare[8].
Google's DeepMind is a leading AI research organization that continues to hire for AI roles, especially after merging with Google Brain.
Meta AI is a significant player in AI research and development, actively hiring for various AI roles.
Microsoft is actively involved in AI research through its partnership with OpenAI and is hiring AI talent.
Tempus is a leading healthcare AI company specializing in precision medicine and clinical data analytics, consistently recognized as a top healthcare AI firm and actively expanding its AI team[3].

all_candidates_full_list.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research company actively hiring for AI roles, particularly in foundational models like ChatGPT.
Anthropic is a prominent AI research startup known for its high retention rate and active hiring of AI talent.
Google's DeepMind is a leading AI research organization that continues to hire for AI roles, especially after merging with Google Brain.
Microsoft is actively involved in AI research through its partnership with OpenAI and is hiring AI talent.
Meta AI is a significant player in AI research and development, actively hiring for various AI roles.
Amazon is a large enterprise with significant AI research and hiring efforts across various departments.
NVIDIA is a key player in AI hardware and software, though its hiring focus is more on engineering and development.
Cerebras Systems is a startup focused on AI hardware, actively hiring for AI-related roles.
Zoox is an autonomous vehicle startup with AI research components, though its primary focus is not foundational AI.
Inflection AI is a startup focused on conversational AI, actively hiring for AI roles.
Tempus is a leading healthcare AI company specializing in precision medicine and clinical data analytics, consistently recognized as a top healthcare AI firm and actively expanding its AI team[3].
PathAI applies AI to pathology for drug discovery and diagnostics, is listed among top healthcare AI companies, and is known for hiring AI/ML talent[3].
Insilico Medicine is a prominent AI-driven drug discovery company, recently raised $110M in Series E funding, and is actively advancing AI-discovered drugs into clinical trials[5][12].
Anima Biotech uses AI for mRNA biology and drug discovery, has multiple preclinical candidates, and collaborates with major pharma companies, indicating ongoing R&D and likely hiring[5].
Atomwise is a well-known AI drug discovery company with published results on its AI platform, suggesting active research and potential hiring for AI roles[5].

Moderna is a major biotech firm aggressively integrating AI across R&D, manufacturing, and operations, with public initiatives like its AI Academy and hundreds of custom GPT agents, indicating active hiring for AI talent[7].

Novartis is a global pharma leader using AI for clinical trial design, site selection, and drug discovery, with ongoing public research and digital transformation efforts likely requiring AI hires[7].
Aidoc is a leading AI medical imaging company that recently raised $150M, indicating growth and likely hiring for AI roles in healthcare[8].
Formation Bio focuses on AI-driven biomanufacturing optimization, recently raised a Series D, and is scaling operations, suggesting active hiring for AI and biotech roles[10].
Trilobio is an AI-driven single-cell proteomics startup that recently raised an $8M seed round led by AI-focused VCs, indicating active hiring in AI for biotech[10].
